prayer.title: 🕯️ Morning Prayer
prayer.modeh_ani: מודה אני לפניך — I gratefully thank You, living and eternal King, for returning my soul within me with compassion.
prayer.blessing: Blessed are You who clothes the naked — provide for all my needs this day.
prayer.psalm: **Psalm 20:4**: "May He give you the desire of your heart and make all your plans succeed."
prayer.proverb: **Proverbs 10:4**: "A slack hand causes poverty, but the hand of the diligent makes rich."
prayer.intention: Let my work today compound into something that outlasts me.
prayer.closing: May your work today be a pleasing offering. May your rest tonight be deep and restorative.

relationship.title: 💗 Relationship Temperature
recommendations: PRIORITY: Focus on repair. Acknowledge recent conflicts without defending.
Increase acts of service dramatically this week.
Create space for her to express frustrations without fixing.

today.description: Rain showers this morning with some sunshine during the afternoon hours. Winds WSW at 10-20 mph.

mre.title: 📊 MRE Trading
mre.thesis: Fear elevated at 38, sideways regime. Multiple BUY signals across sectors - strongest in tech (QQQ, XLC, XLK). 15 total BUY signals vs 9 HOLD.

headlines.title: New START Nuclear Treaty Expired February 5th
headlines.description: US-Russia nuclear arms control treaty expired, ending Cold War-era cooperation. No binding limits on strategic nuclear arsenals for first time in 50+ years.
headlines.significance: Major geopolitical development - UN Secretary General warns of 'grave moment' for international peace and security

headlines.title: 2026: AI Moves from Hype to Pragmatism
headlines.description: Industry shifting from scaling large models to practical applications. Focus on smaller, domain-specific models and real-world integration.
headlines.significance: Major transition year - scaling laws hitting limits, new architectures needed

headlines.title: Yann LeCun Leaves Meta for $5B World Model Startup
headlines.description: Former Meta chief AI scientist starting own world model lab, reportedly seeking $5 billion valuation
headlines.significance: High-profile AI talent movement, world models gaining momentum
